Test Scenarios: US3. As a coach, I want to create reusable session types so that I can quickly offer specific services to my clients with pre-defined durations and locations.
Open Create Session Type popup and verify defaults
Step:
1. Navigate to Booking > Session Types page
2. Click "+Add New Session Type" CTA button
3. Verify the Create Session Type popup opens
4. Verify default values of all fields
Expected:
- Create Session Type popup opens as overlay on Session Types page
- Name field is auto-focused with placeholder "e.g. Personal Training session"
- 1:1 Session is selected by default with label "1:1 training, check-in, etc."
- Duration defaults to 30 min
- Location defaults to In-person
- Session type color defaults to Blue
- Description field is empty and optional

Test Scenarios: Group session option is disabled with Coming soon tag
Step:
1. Open Create Session Type popup
2. Observe the Group session option
3. Hover over Group session option
4. Attempt to click Group session
Expected:
- Group session displays primary label "Group session" and secondary label "Class, webinars, etc."
- "Coming soon" tag displayed on top right corner
- Cursor changes to block icon on hover
- Group session cannot be selected

Test Scenarios: Name field character counter and input block at limit
Step:
1. Open Create Session Type popup
2. Type 94 characters into Name field
3. Verify no counter is shown
4. Type 1 more character (95th)
5. Verify counter appears
6. Continue typing until 100 characters
7. Attempt to type beyond 100 characters
Expected:
- No counter visible at 94 characters
- Counter appears at 95 characters showing "95/100"
- Counter updates as typing continues
- At 100 characters, counter shows "100/100"
- Input cursor is blocked at 100 characters
- No additional characters can be typed

Test Scenarios: Name field auto-trims redundant spaces
Step:
1. Open Create Session Type popup
2. Type name with leading and trailing spaces
3. Click Create button
Expected:
- System trims leading and trailing spaces

- Color indicator next to Name field updates to Red
